inputs.label: Ingredient Cost (per item)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw ingredients for one serving.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of raw ingredients for one serving.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten der Rohzutaten für eine Portion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des matières premières pour une portion.

inputs.label: Labor Cost (per item)
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost attributed to one serving.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor cost attributed to one serving.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir porsiyona atfedilen doğrudan işçilik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Arbeitskosten, die einer Portion zugerechnet werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct de la main-d'œuvre attribué à une portion.

inputs.label: Overhead Cost (per item)
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs (rent, utilities, etc.) per serving.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect costs (rent, utilities, etc.) per serving.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Porsiyon başına dolaylı maliyetler (kira, elektrik vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Indirekte Kosten (Miete, Nebenkosten usw.) pro Portion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts indirects (loyer, services publics, etc.) par portion.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of ingredient lost to waste (trimming, spoilage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of ingredient lost to waste (trimming, spoilage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık (kesim, bozulma) nedeniyle kaybedilen içerik yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Zutaten, die durch Abfall verloren gehen (Trimmen, Verderb).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'ingrédients perdus par déchets (parage, détérioration).

inputs.label: Desired Markup
inputs.businessContext: Markup percentage on total cost to set selling price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Markup percentage on total cost to set selling price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış fiyatını belirlemek için toplam maliyet üzerine kar marjı yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aufschlagsprozentsatz auf die Gesamtkosten zur Festlegung des Verkaufspreises.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de marge sur le coût total pour fixer le prix de vente.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
